events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger at 83! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music industry, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music? Today marks the launch of the iconic channel in 1981, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, becoming one of the fastest-selling British debut albums of all time.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969, attracting over 400,000 people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, the Woodstock Festival kicked off. An iconic moment in music history, bringing together half a million people for peace and music. Wish you were there?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on this day in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history. What's your go-to track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and voice of The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54 today! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis anthem he sang?

events.title: Apple announced the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple introduced the very first iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to our music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the original iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're remembering the visionary John Lennon. His message of peace continues to resonate.
